prompt:
Portrait shot on 85mm f/1.4, close-up of a Japanese woman in her mid-20s, short dark wet-looking hair, slightly damp texture, strong cheekbones, angular jawline, eyes with deep direct gaze toward window, expression neutral and contained. She wears a plain white ribbed tank top, bare shoulders visible.

Upper body portrait, side profile leaning slightly toward window, arms folded on windowsill, subject occupies 60% of frame, window light as only source.

Black and white rendering, high-grain film aesthetic, strong directional side lighting from window, soft falloff on shadow side, reminiscent of 1990s Japanese photography books.

Photographic texture and quality: visible film grain especially in shadow, skin texture with natural pores and slight imperfection, stray hairs not perfectly groomed, photographic texture not CG render smoothness.

Avoid: color, AI-smoothed skin, overly dramatic shadows.

--ar 4:5
